name: poker-tools
description: Community poker tools for Claude — GTO hand review and player-stat analysis for America's Cardroom / WPN hand histories.

plugins.name: poker-hand-review
plugins.description: Review an ACR/WPN poker session hand-by-hand with blunt GTO analysis, ICM/stack-depth adjustments, and tracker stats (VPIP, PFR, 3-Bet, C-Bet, WTSD…) with a play-style read.
